title: Tai Chi
description:
Join us for various fitness classes at the South Norwood Leisure Centre on Thu, 25 Jun 2026.

Schedule of Classes:

  • 09:00 - 10:30 - Tai Chi (90min) - Instructor: Adrianna - (Beginner Class) (Studio 1) - Fully booked
  • 10:30 - 11:30 - Dance Fitness (60min) - Instructor: Gail - Studio 1 - Not available
  • 11:30 - 12:30 - Pilates (60min) - Instructor: Gail - Studio 1 - Not available
  • 12:00 - 12:45 - Aqua Aerobics (45min) - Instructor: Karen - Main Pool - Fully booked
  • 13:00 - 14:00 - Pilates (60min) - Instructor: Michelle - Studio 1 - Not available
  • 17:00 - 18:00 - Yoga (60min) - Instructor: Claudette - Studio 1 - 9 spaces available
  • 18:30 - 19:30 - Circuit Training (60min) - Instructor: Jade - Studio 1 - 15 spaces available
  • 19:15 - 20:00 - Group Cycle (45min) - Instructor: Donna - Studio 2 - 5 spaces available
  • 19:30 - 20:15 - Zumba (45min) - Instructor: Karen - Studio 1 - 1 space available
  • 20:15 - 21:00 - Step Aerobics (45min) - Instructor: Donna - Studio 1 - 9 spaces available

About Yoga:

Embrace the flow of natural body movements to develop strength, flexibility and a peaceful state of mind. From energetic routines to slow, serene sequences, Yoga classes balance movement and meditation to help you feel better inside and out.
address: South Norwood Leisure Centre
